source.label: MARADMIN 051/23, Expansion of the Marine Corps Military Parental Leave Program

rules.note: Commands and Marines ensure parental leave does not exceed 84 days, except per para 8.b.(2). Multiple qualifying events top up to, but do not exceed, 84 days within the window.
Unused parental leave is forfeited one year from the qualifying event. For multiple events, the window is measured from the later event.

citation.label: Increment provision, MARADMIN 051/23 or DoDI 1327.06, source line NOT located

rules.note: User-asserted 7-day minimum increment. NOT located in retrieved issuance text. Confirm the exact source line and threshold before relying on this rule. The 5-day demonstration case denies ONLY on this rule, so this rule's status governs that case outcome.

citation.label: Qualifying-event proximity rule, source line NOT located

rules.note: User-asserted rule: qualifying events within 3 days of each other count as a single qualifying event. NOT located in retrieved issuance text. Confirm before relying.
